contract.summary: navigation V2 统一静态路线骨架（数字 node ID：raw route facts + taxi + waypoint transport + portal + areatrigger 占位）

query.from: uimap / uimapassignment / taxinodes / taxipath / taxipathnode / waypointnode / waypointedge
joins: uimap + uimapassignment 生成 map_anchor 锚点
taxinodes + taxipath + taxipathnode 生成 taxi 节点与静态边
waypointnode + waypointsafelocs 生成公共交通节点（Type=0）
waypointedge 连接公共交通起点 → 终点
waypointnode + waypointsafelocs 生成 portal 节点（Type=1/2）
waypointedge 连接 portal 入口 → 出口
areatrigger + areatriggeractionset 生成 areatrigger 节点与边（占位；当前 wow.db 的 areatriggeractionset 只有 ID/Flags，缺目标端点）
supplemental 映射 UiMap、生成统一 route nodes + edges；本地步行拓扑改由 navigation_walk_components 单独导出
select: map_anchor_raw：V2 参与导航的 UiMap 锚点
transport_edges_raw：公共交通起点 → 终点边
portal_nodes_raw：waypoint portal 节点（Type=1 portal 入口 + Type=2 portal 出口）
trigger_nodes_raw：areatrigger 触发区域节点（占位；当前只掌握 source 点位）
trigger_edges_raw：areatrigger 触发 → 目标边（占位；待补 destination 数据源）
supplemental：统一汇总成 runtime nodes + edges（含 taxi + transport + public_portal + areatrigger）
where: 统一静态骨架不导出 MAP_LINK / WAYPOINT_LINK / UiMap 邻接猜想
V2 runtime 消费 map_anchor 节点、taxi 节点、transport 节点、portal 节点，以及 taxi / transport / public_portal 静态边
walk_local 不提前导出成全世界边，运行时本地接线统一读取 navigation_walk_components.localEdges
waypoint transport 边按 PlayerConditionID 分层：0 无条件纳入，924/923 标注 faction，其余暂不纳入
public_portal 边按 PlayerConditionID 分层：0 无条件纳入，924/923 标注 faction，其余暂不纳入
areatrigger 边为公共设施，对所有角色可用（占位；现阶段先不猜目标端点）
query.row_granularity: map_anchor_raw 一行代表一个 UiMap 锚点；nodes_raw 一行代表一个 TaxiNode；edges_raw 一行代表一条 TaxiPath；transport_nodes_raw 一行代表一个公共交通 waypoint 节点；transport_edges_raw 一行代表一条公共交通边；portal_nodes_raw 一行代表一个 portal 入口/出口节点；portal_edges_raw 一行代表一条 portal 边

map_anchor_raw.sql: WITH map_anchor_base AS (SELECT CAST(u.ID AS INTEGER) AS ui_map_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(u.Name_lang), ''), 'UiMap #' || CAST(u.ID AS TEXT)) AS node_name, CAST(COALESCE(u.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_type, CAST(COALESCE(u.System, 0) AS INTEGER) AS system_id, CAST(COALESCE((SELECT MIN(CAST(a.MapID AS INTEGER)) FROM uimapassignment a WHERE CAST(a.UiMapID AS INTEGER) = CAST(u.ID AS INTEGER)), 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_id FROM uimap u WHERE CAST(u.ID AS INTEGER) > 0) SELECT ui_map_id, map_id, node_name, map_type FROM map_anchor_base WHERE system_id = 0 AND map_type >= 3 ORDER BY ui_map_id

joins: uimapassignment a（仅用于恢复 UiMap -> MapID）
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 V2 map_anchor 原始锚点

nodes_raw.sql: SELECT CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER) AS taxi_node_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(tn.Name_lang), ''), 'Taxi Node #' || CAST(tn.ID AS TEXT)) AS node_name, CAST(COALESCE(tn.ContinentID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_id, CAST(COALESCE(tn.Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS pos_x, CAST(COALESCE(tn.Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS pos_y, CAST(COALESCE(tn.Pos_2, 0) AS REAL) AS pos_z, CAST(COALESCE(tn.Flags, 0) AS INTEGER) AS node_flags, CAST(COALESCE(tn.ConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(tn.VisibilityConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS visibility_condition_id FROM taxinodes tn WHERE CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(tn.ID AS INTEGER)

query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 TaxiNode 原始记录

edges_raw.sql: SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER)) AS edge_index, CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER) AS path_id, CAST(tp.FromTaxiNode AS INTEGER) AS from_taxi_node_id, CAST(tp.ToTaxiNode AS INTEGER) AS to_taxi_node_id FROM taxipath tp WHERE CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(tp.FromTaxiNode AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(tp.ToTaxiNode AS INTEGER) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(tp.ID AS INTEGER)

where: 起点 / 终点 TaxiNode 有效
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条 TaxiPath 原始记录

portal_nodes_raw.sql: SELECT CAST(node.ID AS INTEGER) AS waypoint_node_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(node.Name_lang), ''), 'Portal #' || CAST(node.ID AS TEXT)) AS node_name, CAST(COALESCE(node.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS node_type, CAST(COALESCE(node.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(loc.MapID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_id, CAST(COALESCE(loc.Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS world_x, CAST(COALESCE(loc.Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS world_y, CAST(COALESCE(loc.Pos_2, 0) AS REAL) AS world_z FROM waypointnode node LEFT JOIN waypointsafelocs loc ON CAST(loc.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(node.SafeLocID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(node.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(COALESCE(node.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) IN (1, 2) ORDER BY CAST(node.ID AS INTEGER)

joins: waypointsafelocs ON SafeLocID，恢复世界坐标
where: waypointnode.Type IN (1, 2)：1 = portal 入口，2 = portal 出口
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 waypoint portal 节点（入口或出口）

portal_edges_raw.sql: SELECT CAST(edge.ID AS INTEGER) AS waypoint_edge_id, CAST(edge.Start AS INTEGER) AS from_waypoint_node_id, CAST(edge.End AS INTEGER) AS to_waypoint_node_id, CAST(COALESCE(edge.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id FROM waypointedge edge LEFT JOIN waypointnode start_node ON CAST(start_node.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(edge.Start AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN waypointnode end_node ON CAST(end_node.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(edge.End AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(edge.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(edge.Start AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(edge.End AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(COALESCE(start_node.Type, -1) AS INTEGER) = 1 AND CAST(COALESCE(end_node.Type, -1) AS INTEGER) = 2 ORDER BY CAST(edge.ID AS INTEGER)

joins: waypointnode Start（确认为 Type=1 portal 入口）
waypointnode End（确认为 Type=2 portal 出口）
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条 public portal 连接边（入口 → 出口）

transport_nodes_raw.sql: SELECT CAST(node.ID AS INTEGER) AS waypoint_node_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(node.Name_lang), ''), 'Waypoint #' || CAST(node.ID AS TEXT)) AS node_name, CAST(COALESCE(node.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS node_type, CAST(COALESCE(node.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id, CAST(COALESCE(loc.MapID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_id, CAST(COALESCE(loc.Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS world_x, CAST(COALESCE(loc.Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS world_y, CAST(COALESCE(loc.Pos_2, 0) AS REAL) AS world_z FROM waypointnode node LEFT JOIN waypointsafelocs loc ON CAST(loc.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(node.SafeLocID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(node.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(COALESCE(node.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) = 0 ORDER BY CAST(node.ID AS INTEGER)

joins: waypointsafelocs ON SafeLocID，恢复世界坐标
where: waypointnode.Type = 0：公共交通/普通 waypoint 节点，后续 enrichment 再筛 transport 动作
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 waypoint 公共交通候选节点（Type=0）

transport_edges_raw.sql: SELECT CAST(edge.ID AS INTEGER) AS waypoint_edge_id, CAST(edge.Start AS INTEGER) AS from_waypoint_node_id, CAST(edge.End AS INTEGER) AS to_waypoint_node_id, CAST(COALESCE(edge.PlayerConditionID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS player_condition_id FROM waypointedge edge LEFT JOIN waypointnode start_node ON CAST(start_node.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(edge.Start AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN waypointnode end_node ON CAST(end_node.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(edge.End AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(edge.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(edge.Start AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(edge.End AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(COALESCE(start_node.Type, -1) AS INTEGER) = 0 AND CAST(COALESCE(end_node.Type, -1) AS INTEGER) = 0 ORDER BY CAST(edge.ID AS INTEGER)

joins: waypointnode Start（确认为 Type=0 公共交通候选起点）
waypointnode End（确认为 Type=0 公共交通候选终点）
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条 waypoint 公共交通候选边（Type=0 → Type=0）

trigger_nodes_raw.sql: SELECT CAST(ID AS INTEGER) AS trigger_id, CAST(COALESCE(ContinentID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS map_id, CAST(COALESCE(Pos_0, 0) AS REAL) AS pos_x, CAST(COALESCE(Pos_1, 0) AS REAL) AS pos_y, CAST(COALESCE(Pos_2, 0) AS REAL) AS pos_z, CAST(COALESCE(Radius, 0) AS REAL) AS radius FROM areatrigger WHERE CAST(ID AS INTEGER) > 0 ORDER BY CAST(ID AS INTEGER)

query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 areatrigger 触发区域（占位；当前 wow.db 仅能稳定提供 source 点位）

trigger_edges_raw.sql: SELECT 1 AS placeholder FROM areatrigger WHERE 1 = 0

joins: areatrigger.AreaTriggerActionSetID → areatriggeractionset.ID（当前 wow.db 仅能连到 ID/Flags，无法恢复目标端点）
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一条 areatrigger 传送边（触发区域 → 目标坐标），占位；待补独立 destination 数据源

structure.lua_shape: Toolbox.Data.NavigationRouteEdges = { schemaVersion, sourceMode, generatedAt, nodes, edges }

change_log.summary: 旧统一路线边仍保留 UiMapLink + waypoint 解析直连边
V1 改为统一静态路线骨架：只保留 map_anchor / taxi 节点与 taxi 静态边
V2 public_portal：新增 portal 节点（portal_N）+ public_portal 边，汇入统一静态边表
V2 areatrigger 占位：新增 trigger 节点 / 边骨架；当前 wow.db 缺目标端点，待补独立 destination 数据源
V2 waypoint transport：新增 Type=0 公共交通节点/边导出，补齐飞艇/船/地铁等静态 transport 边
V2 数字 node ID：统一把 NodeID/FromNodeID/ToNodeID 迁移为不透明数字，并新增 SourceID 与 WalkClusterNodeID
移除 route node 上的 WalkClusterNodeID；本地步行接线改由 navigation_walk_components schema v2 的 explicit localEdges 独立承载
